title: TopBuild Corp (NYSE: BLD) - Company Analysis
text: Financial Overview: Market Position: Market Cap: US$11.6 billion. Current Share Price: US$400.76. 52-Week Range: US$273.87 - US$559.47. Recent Financial Performance (Q1 2026): Revenue: US$1.45 billion (up 17% YoY). EPS: US$3.75 (down from US$4.25 in Q1 2025). Operating Margin: 12.1% (down 2.3 percentage points). Net Income: US$104.8 million (down 15% YoY). TTM Metrics: Revenue: US$5.62 billion. Net Earnings: US$503.16 million. P/E Ratio: 22.3x. Net Profit Margin: 8.95%. Debt/Equity Ratio: 117.8%. Valuation Assessment: According to analysts, the stock is trading at 9.5% below our estimate of its fair value. The analyst consensus target price is US$478.91, suggesting modest upside potential. Key Business Insights: TopBuild operates in two segments: Installation Services and Specialty Distribution, focusing on insulation and building materials for the construction industry. Growth Outlook: Earnings are forecast to grow 6.72% annually over the next three years. Major Development: QXO Acquisition: In April 2026, QXO agreed to acquire TopBuild for US$14.3 billion, or US$505 per share. The transaction is expected to close in Q3 2026 and is anticipated to be immediately and substantially accretive to the company's earnings.
